products.title: Stormridge 3L Insulated Rain Jacket
products.description: A waterproof 3-layer shell with synthetic insulation. Rated for cold, wet hikes from 5°C down to -10°C. PFC-free DWR finish; sealed seams; pit zips.

products.title: Featherline Ultralight Down Jacket 800FP
products.description: Packable down jacket with 800 fill power for cold, dry conditions. 280 g. Not waterproof; pair with a shell for rain.

products.title: Trailrunner Windbreaker
products.description: Lightweight wind shell for cool, dry trail runs. Not waterproof, not insulated. Stows into its own pocket.

products.title: Skylight 2 Ultralight Tent
products.description: Two-person, 3-season tent weighing 1.78 kg packed. Single-pole design. 30D ripstop nylon. Two doors, two vestibules.

products.title: Basecamp 2 Trekking Tent
products.description: Roomy 2-person 3-season tent with 70D floor. 2.4 kg packed. Better headroom; not as light as the Skylight 2.

products.title: Polaris -15 Sleeping Bag
products.description: Mummy bag rated to -15°C comfort, -22°C limit. 850FP hydrophobic down. Designed for winter expeditions and sub-zero alpine camps.

products.title: Riverstone Waterproof Hiking Shoe (Women's)
products.description: Low-cut women's hiking shoe with Gore-Tex membrane and Vibram sole. Excellent on wet trails and stream crossings.

products.title: Summit 45 Backpack
products.description: 45-litre hiking backpack with adjustable torso and ventilated back panel. Rain cover included.
